description: Multi-turn session scenarios — realistic vibe coding workflows

python-webapp-feature.description: Add due_date feature to FastAPI app (9 turns)
turns: read all source files and explain the project architecture
add a due_date field (Optional[str]) to the Todo class in app/models.py
update app/store.py add() method to accept due_date parameter
add a GET /todos/overdue endpoint to app/main.py that returns todos with due_date before today
read tests/test_store.py then add tests for the due_date feature
read CLAUDE.md and check if we are following all conventions
add input validation to the create_todo endpoint: title must not be empty and max 200 chars
create app/middleware.py with request logging that logs method, path, and response time
read all modified files and summarize what we changed in this session

python-webapp-refactor.description: Refactor and improve code quality (8 turns)
turns: read all source files and identify code quality issues
refactor app/store.py to use an abstract base class (ABC) as interface
add proper error handling: create app/errors.py with custom exception classes
update app/main.py to use the custom exceptions with proper HTTP status codes
add type hints to any functions missing them
add docstrings to all public functions following Google style
create tests/test_errors.py with tests for error handling
read all files and verify the refactoring is complete

react-webapp-feature.description: Add search and filter to React app (8 turns)
turns: read all source files and explain the component structure
create src/components/SearchBar.tsx with a controlled input that calls onSearch prop
create src/hooks/useFilter.ts with filter state for priority, completion, and search query
create src/components/FilterBar.tsx with priority filter buttons (All, Low, Medium, High)
update src/App.tsx to integrate SearchBar and FilterBar with the todo list
create src/components/Stats.tsx showing total, completed, pending counts
create src/__tests__/SearchBar.test.tsx with render and interaction tests
read all modified files and check TypeScript types are correct

react-webapp-refactor.description: Refactor React app for better architecture (7 turns)
turns: read src/App.tsx — it has too much logic. plan how to split it
create src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts for persisting todos to localStorage
update src/hooks/useTodos.ts to use useLocalStorage for persistence
create src/components/AddTodoForm.tsx extracting the form from App.tsx
update src/App.tsx to use AddTodoForm component
add dark mode: create src/context/ThemeContext.tsx with toggle
read all files and verify no TypeScript errors in the refactoring

go-webapp-feature.description: Add REST endpoints and middleware to Go app (9 turns)
turns: read all Go files and explain the project structure
create handler/handler.go extracting HTTP handlers from main.go into a Handler struct
add a DELETE /todos/{id} endpoint to handler.go
add a PATCH /todos/{id}/toggle endpoint to handler.go
create middleware/logging.go with request logging middleware
update main.go to use the handler package and logging middleware
add a GET /health endpoint returning JSON with status and todo count
create handler/handler_test.go with table-driven tests using httptest
read all files and verify the refactoring compiles
read store/store.go and identify improvements needed
add context.Context as first parameter to all Store methods
extract a Store interface for testability
add proper error wrapping with fmt.Errorf and %w to all error returns
create store/mock_test.go with a mock implementation of the Store interface
add benchmark tests for Add and List operations in store_test.go
create a Makefile with targets: build, test, bench, lint, run

python-desktop-feature.description: Add persistence and UI features to Tkinter app (8 turns)
turns: read all source files and explain the MVC architecture
create app/persistence.py with save_to_file and load_from_file using JSON
update app/ui.py to add File menu with Save and Load options
add keyboard shortcuts: Enter to add, Delete to remove, Space to toggle
create app/theme.py with dark and light color schemes
update app/ui.py to support theme switching via a menu option
add a search entry field that filters the listbox in real-time
create tests/test_persistence.py with tests for save and load

react-mobile-feature.description: Add screens and navigation to React Native app (8 turns)
turns: read all source files and explain the app structure
create src/screens/AddTodoScreen.tsx with form for title, priority picker
create src/navigation/AppNavigator.tsx with stack navigation between Home and AddTodo
create src/components/PriorityBadge.tsx with colored badge for each priority level
update src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx to add a floating action button for navigation to AddTodo
create src/hooks/useAsyncStorage.ts for persisting todos
add pull-to-refresh to HomeScreen
create src/__tests__/HomeScreen.test.tsx with render tests

debug-session.description: Debug and fix multiple issues (6 turns)
debug-session.setup: sed -i 's/is not None/is None/' app/store.py && sed -i 's/to_lowercase/to_uppercase/' app/store.py
turns: there are bugs in this project. read app/store.py and find them
fix the delete method — it returns True when the todo does not exist
fix the search method — it should be case-insensitive but it is not working
read tests/test_store.py and run the tests to verify the fixes
add more tests to cover the edge cases we just fixed
read all files and confirm everything is working correctly
I want to add a tagging system to this todo app. Read the code and create a plan. Do NOT implement yet.
the plan looks good. start with step 1: update the Todo model to support tags
now implement step 2: add tag management methods to the store
implement step 3: add API endpoints for managing tags
write tests for the tagging feature
review all changes and make sure everything is consistent
